metadata.title: We Don't Deserve Forgiveness But Please Try To Forget Us
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Have Long Ago Forgotten Our Names, But We Will Remember Our Mistakes Forever
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Our Demise Is Our Greatest Apology
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Are Blessed To Have Never Known Anything Other Than Pain
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Just Know We Have Never Stopped Suffering
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Agony And Regret Are All We Have Left
06 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Are Ruin
